We use cookies to enhance your experienc: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze site usage, and deliver personalized content.
Choose which cookie categories you want: Choose which cookie categories you want to allow. You can always change these later.
Note: Essential cookies are always activ: Note: Essential cookies are always active to ensure the site works properly.
Required for basic functionality and sec: Required for basic functionality and security (cannot be disabled).
Help us measure and improve the product: Help us measure and improve the product experience.
Used to show relevant content and ads.
Cookies are small text files stored on y: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us recognize your device, remember preferences (like language), and provide a personalized experience.
Cookies can be first-party (set by this: Cookies can be first-party (set by this site) or third-party (set by external services we use). We use several types of cookies to deliver the best experience while respecting your privacy.
To remember your login and settings for: To remember your login and settings for a smoother experience.
To analyze traffic and improve the produ: To analyze traffic and improve the product (analytics cookies).
To show personalized content and recomme: To show personalized content and recommended items (marketing cookies).
To secure the service and detect fraud.
Required for core functionality (login,: Required for core functionality (login, security, accessibility). These are always active.
Help us understand how users interact wi: Help us understand how users interact with the site to improve features and performance.
Remember choices and preferences to prov: Remember choices and preferences to provide personalized features.
Used by third-party partners to display: Used by third-party partners to display relevant ads and track ad performance.
You can accept all cookies, or manage pr: You can accept all cookies, or manage preferences to enable only the categories you want. Disabling some cookies may reduce functionality or personalization.
For questions about this policy or your: For questions about this policy or your preferences, email us at

We may collect information you provide d: We may collect information you provide directly such as name, email, profile picture, posts, messages, and other content. We may also collect IP address, device info, browser type, and usage data automatically.
We use your information to operate and i: We use your information to operate and improve our platform, personalize your experience, respond to inquiries, and provide customer support. Notifications and updates may also be sent.
We do not sell your personal information: We do not sell your personal information. We may share it with trusted service providers, legal authorities if required, or in case of a business transfer.
We implement reasonable security measure: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.
You may update your profile, delete your: You may update your profile, delete your account, or request data removal at any time. Contact us for assistance.
We may update this policy occasionally. Continued use of the platform means you agree to the updated terms.
If you have any questions regarding our: If you have any questions regarding our Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Welcome to our Social Media App. By acce: Welcome to our Social Media App. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.
You must be at least 13 years old to use: You must be at least 13 years old to use this platform.
You agree not to post any content that i: You agree not to post any content that is illegal, harmful, abusive, hateful, or otherwise inappropriate. Harassment, spam, and impersonation are strictly prohibited.
You are responsible for maintaining the: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.
You retain ownership of your content but: You retain ownership of your content but grant us a license to use, display, and distribute it within the platform.
We reserve the right to suspend or delet: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account if you violate these terms or engage in harmful behavior.
We may update these Terms from time to t: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform indicates your acceptance of any changes.
If you have any questions about these Te: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
